query: SELECT b.id, b.sessionDate, b.sessionStartTime, b.status, b.createdAt, p.type as program_type, u.name FROM bookings b JOIN programs p ON b.programId = p.id JOIN users u ON b.userId = u.id WHERE p.type = 'junior_daily' ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mUSTnZHSjH9Rc4V.ee5fccb85a53 --database kzZFsCRUb4iWMZR8LEwAKz --execute SELECT b.id, b.sessionDate, b.sessionStartTime, b.status, b.createdAt, p.type as program_type, u.name FROM bookings b JOIN programs p ON b.programId = p.id JOIN users u ON b.userId = u.id WHERE p.type = 'junior_daily' ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
